items.title: [负面] There might be some good mechanics in play here, b...
items.summary: There might be some good mechanics in play here, but the character designs (which are simultaneously too generic and overwrought) and cliched storyline effectively bar the way to appreciation.

items.title:
[正面] Игра роскошная. Чем зацепила: 

— Дизайн персонаже...
